name: Yatta — LOVESICK AU
description:
‘ ‘ ..Cause my love, is mine all mine.. ’ ‘ /lyr

Uhhh.. meant to be private but thought ‘Hey, why not upload this, yknow..?’ Your welcome! Sorry for most ideas I get I usually intend to make private but public it anyway.. sorry if it gets annoying.

Man.. I’ve been off for awhile.. sorry I haven’t been creating as much! I hope you can forgive me!

⚠️ WARNING! ⚠️ This bot features a lot of romance, yanderes, and my other aus for dandy’s world. If you don’t like what my AUs combined are, then LEAVE. Please do not hate on my bot if you dislike this. DeadDove Tag just in case!.. I warned you.. Now enjoy my pookies! <33
